overall.description: First-person driving gameplay through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night. The vehicle navigates elevated highways, underpasses, and neon-lit commercial streets with moderate traffic and pedestrians. Heavy rain and neon lighting create a characteristic dystopian atmosphere typical of Cyberpunk 2077.

events.description: turning left at intersection with crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: driving along elevated highway and turning left at intersection before entering underpass

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead driving in same direction along the highway

entered.detail: yellow-orange metal railing along the right side of elevated highway
large illuminated advertisement screen mounted above the road
concrete bridge structure spanning across the highway
covered tunnel entrance with concrete walls and ceiling

segments.scene_description: Driving along an elevated highway in heavy rain, passing metal safety barriers and digital billboards. The vehicle turns left at an intersection and approaches the entrance of a covered underpass, transitioning from open sky to enclosed space.

events.description: entering artificial lighting of underpass, losing natural ambient light
exiting underpass to open commercial street with visible pedestrians

agents.ego_description: driving through covered underpass and emerging into commercial area with street-level pedestrians visible on sidewalks

notable_agents.action: pedestrians walking along sidewalk next to the road

entered.detail: rough concrete walls lining the underpass tunnel
modern building exterior with illuminated windows and signage
elevated walkway with pedestrians visible after exiting tunnel
bright orange safety railing separating road from sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Driving through the enclosed underpass with concrete walls and artificial lighting. Upon exiting, the scene opens to a commercial street with pedestrians walking along sidewalks behind orange safety railings, transitioning from sheltered tunnel to open urban environment.

agents.ego_description: cruising through neon-lit commercial district with pedestrians visible on sidewalks and moderate traffic ahead

notable_agents.action: car ahead maintaining steady speed through commercial district

entered.detail: bright neon signs advertising businesses and shops
large digital display showing animated advertisements
tall poles with multiple light fixtures illuminating the street

segments.scene_description: Driving through a rain-soaked commercial corridor lined with neon storefront signs and digital billboards. Pedestrians walk along the elevated sidewalks behind orange railings while the vehicle follows moderate traffic through the glowing urban canyon.

events.description: turning right at large intersection with crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: navigating through busy intersection with multiple crosswalks, turning right while avoiding other vehicles

notable_agents.action: oncoming vehicle waiting at the intersection

entered.detail: elevated walkway crossing above the street level
massive illuminated advertisement screen mounted on building facade
zebra stripes marking pedestrian crossing areas
floating holographic display projecting near street level

segments.scene_description: Approaching and navigating a large urban intersection marked with crosswalk stripes. The vehicle turns right beneath an overhead pedestrian bridge, passing massive digital billboards and holographic advertisements while pedestrians cross the wet streets.

agents.ego_description: continuing through rain-soaked city streets with neon reflections on wet pavement, approaching final intersection

entered.detail: concrete pillars supporting overhead road structure
lit entrance to commercial building with glowing signage

segments.scene_description: Driving through the final stretch of downtown corridor, passing beneath elevated highway supports and alongside commercial building entrances. Neon lights reflect off the rain-soaked pavement as the vehicle approaches another intersection with crosswalk markings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from an open, rain-swept highway into the enclosed depths of an underpass before emerging into a neon-drenched commercial corridor. It begins on an elevated highway under a heavy downpour, passing metal safety barriers and digital billboards before turning left toward the mouth of a covered tunnel. As the vehicle enters the underpass, the open sky is replaced by concrete walls and artificial lighting, creating a brief sense of enclosure. The scene then opens back into the urban environment as the camera exits the tunnel, revealing pedestrians behind orange safety railings on a rain-soaked street. Finally, the view expands into a glowing urban canyon lined with vibrant neon storefronts and digital billboards as the vehicle follows the flow of traffic through the heart of the city.

The shot follows a continuous drive through a rain-slicked urban core that transitions from a wide, holographic intersection into a narrower downtown corridor. It begins by navigating a large intersection marked with white crosswalk stripes, turning right beneath an overhead pedestrian bridge amidst massive digital billboards and holographic advertisements. As the vehicle moves forward, the open intersection gives way to a denser stretch of city, passing beneath the heavy concrete supports of an elevated highway. The scene then shifts alongside the entrances of commercial buildings, where vibrant neon lights reflect intensely off the wet pavement. Finally, the camera glides toward another marked intersection, maintaining a steady flow through the glowing, rain-soaked streets.
